# 第8章 国債先物とCTD

```{r chapter08-treasury-futures}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# ============================================================
# Chapter 08: Treasury Futures and CTD
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 国債先物とCTD分析
#
# 内容:
# 1. US Treasury bond setup
# 2. Price from yield
# 3. Accrued interest hand calculation
# 4. Deliverable basket and gross basis
# 5. Net basis, carry, and implied repo
# 6. Deliverable basket summary and CTD proxy
#
# 前提:
# - QuantLibGauss がインストール済み
# - QuantLib SWIG版が利用可能
# ============================================================

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 0. Setup
# ------------------------------------------------------------

library(QuantLib)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Local formatting helper
# ------------------------------------------------------------

fmt_pct <- function(x, digits = 4) {
  sprintf(
    paste0("%.", digits, "f%%"),
    100 * x
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Calendars, day counters, and enums
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cal_us_gov <- UnitedStates("GovernmentBond")

dc_act_act_bond <- ActualActual("Bond")
dc_act_360 <- Actual360()

cmpd_compounded <- Compounding_Compounded_get()
freq_semiannual <- Frequency_Semiannual_get()

settlement_days_t1 <- 1L

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. US Treasury bond example
# ------------------------------------------------------------

bond_bundle <- QuantLibGauss::qlg_us_treasury_bond(
  effective_date = "2022-09-30",
  maturity_date = "2027-09-30",
  coupon_rate_pct = 4.125,
  face_amount = 100,
  settlement_days = settlement_days_t1,
  calendar = cal_us_gov,
  day_counter = dc_act_act_bond
)

bond_obj <- bond_bundle$bond

QuantLibGauss::qlg_show_tbl(
  QuantLibGauss::qlg_schedule_dates(
    bond_bundle$schedule
  ),
  "US Treasury bond schedule",
  n = 20
)

cf_prc <- bond_obj$cleanPrice(
  6 / 100,
  dc_act_act_bond,
  cmpd_compounded,
  freq_semiannual,
  QuantLibGauss::qlg_date("2023-07-06")
)

cat(
  "Yield 6%, settle 2023-07-06 clean price:",
  QuantLibGauss::qlg_fmt_num(cf_prc, 4),
  "\n"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Yield 3.70% to price
# ------------------------------------------------------------

trade_date <- QuantLibGauss::qlg_date("2023-04-20")

bond_yield <- 3.70 / 100
futures_price <- 109 + 10 / 32

QuantLibGauss::qlg_set_eval_date(
  trade_date
)

settle_date <- QuantLibGauss::qlg_advance_days(
  calendar_obj = cal_us_gov,
  date_obj = trade_date,
  n_days = settlement_days_t1
)

accrued_amount <- bond_obj$accruedAmount(
  settle_date
)

clean_price <- bond_obj$cleanPrice(
  bond_yield,
  dc_act_act_bond,
  cmpd_compounded,
  freq_semiannual,
  settle_date
)

dirty_price <- clean_price + accrued_amount

i_rate_obj <- InterestRate(
  bond_yield,
  dc_act_act_bond,
  cmpd_compounded,
  freq_semiannual
)

QuantLibGauss::qlg_show_tbl(
  tibble::tibble(
    trade_date = QuantLibGauss::qlg_iso(
      trade_date
    ),
    settle_date = QuantLibGauss::qlg_iso(
      settle_date
    ),
    bond_yield = bond_yield,
    accrued_amount = accrued_amount,
    clean_price = clean_price,
    dirty_price = dirty_price
  ),
  "Bond price from yield",
  n = 20
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Bond cashflow present-value table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

settle_date_r <- as.Date(
  QuantLibGauss::qlg_iso(settle_date)
)

bond_cf_tbl <- QuantLibGauss::qlg_bond_cashflow_table(
  bond_obj
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pay_date_r = as.Date(
      as.character(pay_date)
    ),
    discount_factor = dplyr::if_else(
      pay_date_r >= settle_date_r,
      purrr::map_dbl(
        as.character(pay_date),
        function(x) {
          tryCatch(
            i_rate_obj$discountFactor(
              settle_date,
              QuantLibGauss::qlg_date(x)
            ),
            error = function(e) {
              NA_real_
            }
          )
        }
      ),
      NA_real_
    ),
    pv = amount * discount_factor
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    pay_date,
    coupon_rate,
    accrual_start,
    accrual_end,
    amount,
    discount_factor,
    pv,
    cashflow_type
  )

QuantLibGauss::qlg_show_tbl(
  bond_cf_tbl,
  "Bond cashflow present-value table",
  n = 20
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Accrued interest hand calculation
# ------------------------------------------------------------

previous_coupon_date <- QuantLibGauss::qlg_date(
  "2023-03-31"
)

spot_settlement_date <- QuantLibGauss::qlg_date(
  "2023-04-21"
)

next_coupon_date <- QuantLibGauss::qlg_date(
  "2023-09-30"
)

accrued_days_hand <- dc_act_act_bond$dayCount(
  previous_coupon_date,
  spot_settlement_date
)

coupon_period_days <- dc_act_act_bond$dayCount(
  previous_coupon_date,
  next_coupon_date
)

coupon_amount_semiannual <- 4.125 / 2

accrued_interest_hand <-
  coupon_amount_semiannual *
  accrued_days_hand /
  coupon_period_days

QuantLibGauss::qlg_show_tbl(
  tibble::tibble(
    previous_coupon_date =
      QuantLibGauss::qlg_iso(
        previous_coupon_date
      ),
    settlement_date =
      QuantLibGauss::qlg_iso(
        spot_settlement_date
      ),
    next_coupon_date =
      QuantLibGauss::qlg_iso(
        next_coupon_date
      ),
    accrued_days = accrued_days_hand,
    coupon_period_days = coupon_period_days,
    coupon_amount = coupon_amount_semiannual,
    accrued_interest_hand =
      accrued_interest_hand,
    accrued_amount_quantlib =
      accrued_amount
  ),
  "Accrued interest hand calculation",
  n = 20
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Deliverable basket and gross basis
# ------------------------------------------------------------

deliverable_tbl <- tibble::tribble(
  ~issue_date,
  ~maturity_date,
  ~coupon_rate_pct,
  ~conversion_factor,
  ~market_yield_pct,
  "2022-09-30",
  "2027-09-30",
  4.125,
  0.9305,
  3.70,
  "2022-08-31",
  "2027-08-31",
  3.125,
  0.8953,
  3.69,
  "2023-01-31",
  "2028-01-31",
  3.500,
  0.9011,
  3.65
)

gross_basis_tbl <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  deliverable_tbl,
  function(
    issue_date,
    maturity_date,
    coupon_rate_pct,
    conversion_factor,
    market_yield_pct
  ) {
    QuantLibGauss::qlg_bond_futures_gross_basis_row(
      issue_date = issue_date,
      maturity_date = maturity_date,
      coupon_rate_pct = coupon_rate_pct,
      conversion_factor = conversion_factor,
      market_yield_pct = market_yield_pct,
      settlement_date = settle_date,
      futures_price = futures_price,
      settlement_days = settlement_days_t1,
      calendar = cal_us_gov,
      day_counter = dc_act_act_bond,
      compounding = cmpd_compounded,
      frequency = freq_semiannual
    )
  }
)

cat(
  "Futures price:",
  QuantLibGauss::qlg_fmt_num(
    futures_price,
    6
  ),
  ", spot settlement date:",
  QuantLibGauss::qlg_iso(
    settle_date
  ),
  "\n"
)

QuantLibGauss::qlg_show_tbl(
  gross_basis_tbl |>
    dplyr::select(
      -dplyr::any_of("bond_obj")
    ),
  "Gross basis table",
  n = 20
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 8. Net basis, carry, and implied repo
# ------------------------------------------------------------

repo_rate <- 5.10 / 100

repo_end_date <- QuantLibGauss::qlg_date(
  "2023-07-06"
)

repo_year_frac <- dc_act_360$yearFraction(
  settle_date,
  repo_end_date
)

repo_days <- dc_act_360$dayCount(
  settle_date,
  repo_end_date
)

net_basis_tbl <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(
    bond_obj =
      gross_basis_tbl$bond_obj,
    conversion_factor =
      gross_basis_tbl$conversion_factor,
    clean_price =
      gross_basis_tbl$clean_price,
    dirty_price =
      gross_basis_tbl$dirty_price,
    gross_basis =
      gross_basis_tbl$gross_basis
  ),
  function(
    bond_obj,
    conversion_factor,
    clean_price,
    dirty_price,
    gross_basis
  ) {
    QuantLibGauss::qlg_bond_futures_net_basis_row(
      bond_obj = bond_obj,
      conversion_factor = conversion_factor,
      clean_price = clean_price,
      dirty_price = dirty_price,
      gross_basis = gross_basis,
      settlement_date = settle_date,
      repo_end_date = repo_end_date,
      repo_rate = repo_rate,
      repo_day_counter = dc_act_360,
      carry_day_counter = dc_act_360,
      futures_price = futures_price
    )
  }
)

cat(
  "Repo rate:",
  fmt_pct(repo_rate),
  ", repo end date:",
  QuantLibGauss::qlg_iso(
    repo_end_date
  ),
  ", repo days:",
  repo_days,
  ", repo year fraction:",
  QuantLibGauss::qlg_fmt_num(
    repo_year_frac,
    6
  ),
  "\n"
)

QuantLibGauss::qlg_show_tbl(
  net_basis_tbl |>
    dplyr::select(
      -dplyr::any_of("bond_obj")
    ),
  "Net basis table",
  n = 20
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 9. Combined deliverable basket and CTD proxy
# ------------------------------------------------------------

gross_basis_display_tbl <- gross_basis_tbl |>
  dplyr::select(
    -dplyr::any_of("bond_obj")
  )

duplicate_net_cols <- intersect(
  names(net_basis_tbl),
  names(gross_basis_display_tbl)
)

net_basis_additional_tbl <- net_basis_tbl |>
  dplyr::select(
    -dplyr::any_of(
      c(
        "bond_obj",
        duplicate_net_cols
      )
    )
  )

basket_summary_tbl <- dplyr::bind_cols(
  gross_basis_display_tbl,
  net_basis_additional_tbl
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    ctd_proxy =
      dplyr::row_number() ==
      which.min(net_basis)
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(
    net_basis
  )

QuantLibGauss::qlg_show_tbl(
  basket_summary_tbl,
  "Deliverable basket summary",
  n = 20
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 10. CTD proxy result
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ctd_proxy_tbl <- basket_summary_tbl |>
  dplyr::filter(
    ctd_proxy
  )

QuantLibGauss::qlg_show_tbl(
  ctd_proxy_tbl,
  "CTD proxy based on minimum net basis",
  n = 20
)

cat(
  "\nChapter 08 treasury futures and CTD completed successfully.\n"
)
